entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary crop studied for heat responsiveness in Asia and Africa

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where rice cultivation is challenged by climate change

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where rice cultivation is challenged by climate change

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress that impairs rice physiology and reduces grain yield

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural output of rice, reduced by high-temperature stress

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of rice genotypes to maintain growth and yield under high temperature

entities.name: RICE N22
entities.description: A heat-tolerant rice cultivar used in the study

entities.name: RICE VANDANA
entities.description: A heat-susceptible rice cultivar used in the study

entities.name: HEAT TREATMENTS
entities.description: Experimental application of high temperatures to rice cultivars

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: A physiological parameter analyzed to assess heat stress impact

entities.name: MEMBRANE INTEGRITY
entities.description: A physiological parameter analyzed to assess heat stress impact

entities.name: GAS EXCHANGE PARAMETERS
entities.description: Physiological parameters analyzed to assess heat stress impact

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Molecular units whose expression dynamics were analyzed under heat stress

entities.name: MIRNAS
entities.description: MicroRNAs whose expression dynamics were analyzed under heat stress

entities.name: GROWTH STAGES
entities.description: Developmental phases including seedling, vegetative, and reproductive stages

entities.name: RECOVERY
entities.description: The phase following exposure to high temperature stress

entities.name: TRANSGENIC APPROACHES
entities.description: Methods used for genetic modification to develop heat tolerant cultivars

entities.name: GENE EDITING
entities.description: Methods used for precise genetic modification to develop heat tolerant cultivars

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional method for developing heat tolerant rice cultivars

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Global phenomenon driving high-temperature stress in rice cultivation
